title: New Hope
content:

{{Youmay|the [[Starship/Legends|starship]]|the film [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]}}

{{Quote|Welcome aboard the Alliance flagship, the Dreadnaught we call ''New Hope''.|Jan Ors welcomes Kyle Katarn aboard|audio=NewHope-DFSftE.flac|<ref name="SFTEa">[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
The '''''New Hope''''' was an antique [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] that was used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Museum/Legends|museum]]. In an act of psychological warfare, it was acquired by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and served as their [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], being the command ship of [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]].

==Description==
A [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]]<ref name="Luke" /> measuring over six hundred [[meter]]s in length, the ''New Hope'' was a formidable [[Starship/Legends|starship]],<ref name="SFTE" /> possessing [[Hull/Legends|hull plating]] thicker than that of an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial II-class Star Destroyer]] and major offensive weaponry.<ref name="DF:JK" /> However, by [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="SFTEDate">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' to [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].</ref> the ''New Hope'' was outdated and poorly-armed despite efforts by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to upgrade its weapons systems.<ref name="SFTE" />

The ship's corridors were busy with various [[Species/Legends|beings]], [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and [[auto cart]]s. Crewmembers usually hated the ship's meals and most thought the worst was the dinner, although [[Kyle Katarn]] specifically hated the breakfast.<ref name="SFTE" />

The [[Hangar/Legends|hangar bay]] was busy full of sights, sounds and smells. Crammed with [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], [[Assault shuttle/Legends|assault shuttles]], [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]], [[lifeboat]]s, [[gig]]s, [[Courier/Legends|courier ships]] and other craft, some of them halfjunked. Noises from cutters, chains, [[Hydrospanner/Legends|hydrospanners]] and [[PA]] announcements. An overwhelming smell of fumes, paint, metal, chemicals and lubricants permeated the air.<ref name="SFTE" />

The ship was built to pre-Imperial standards, as did its spacious cabins, some designed for ceremonial [[Admiral/Legends|Admirals]]. The furniture in Mothma's cabin was from the previous centuries, and it had its original tapestries, contrasting to her spartan lifestyle.<ref name="SFTE" /><ref name="RA" /><ref name="JK" />

==History==
{{Quote|There's a Destroyer out there—let's give her a history lesson.|[[Tola (Galactic Civil War)|Captain Tola]], during a battle in the Milagro system|<ref name="DF:JK" />}}
It was placed in orbit around the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Churba]] and served as a war [[Museum/Legends|museum]].<ref name="SFTE" /> By [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="SFTEDate" /> it had been captured by the Rebel Alliance with the use of four deep-space [[Spacetug/Legends|tugs]], and was transferred to a top secret locations. There it was repaired and repurposed; this non-military victory made the Alliance to seem stronger. Renamed the ''New Hope'' it was sometimes used as [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma's]] [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] and operated thanks to the eagerness of its volunteer crew.<ref name="SFTE" /><ref name="RA" /><ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

In 1 BBY,<ref name="SFTEDate" /> after a recruiting trip on the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] ''[[Star of Empire]]'', recently-defected Imperial recruit [[Kyle Katarn]] was brought on board the ship in order to be interviewed by Mon Mothma. There, Katarn learned about the [[Operation Skyhook|existence]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] and was assigned on a [[mission to Danuta]]; at the same time, Rebel agent [[Jan Ors]] was assigned to that planet by Mothma to spy on Katarn in case he double-crossed them. From the ship's [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]], Katarn took the worn [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[lighter]] ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'' for the mission.<ref name="SFTE" />

===New Republic service===
Following the [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|transformation]] of the Rebel Alliance into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the ''New Hope'' remained Mon Mothma's flagship as she was elected to the position of [[Chief Councilor]] of the new government. [[Standard month/Legends|Months]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] brought [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] to the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aridus/Legends|Aridus]] for a diplomatic meeting with its inhabitants, the [[Chubbit]]s, encouraging them to join the New Republic. Organa was accompanied aboard the Dreadnaught by the droids [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and her brother, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who berthed his X-wing starfighter onboard.<ref name="Luke" />
Around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] the ship had a complete overhaul.<ref name="JK" />

After [[Trioculus]]'s [[Plan Number Two|attack]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> the [[New Republic Provisional Council]] largely abandoned the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]] in favor of mobility. Their base was ''New Hope'' skipping between several hideouts such as [[Noquivzor]] and the [[Milagro system/Legends|Milagro system]].<ref name="The Star Wars Spy Game: SPIN Declassified">{{SW|url=news/the-star-wars-spy-game-spin-declassified|text=The ''Star Wars'' Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|int=The Star Wars Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|nolive=1}}</ref>

[[File:MorganHologram.jpg|thumb|left|Jan shows [[Morgan Katarn]]'s message to Mon Mothma, Luke and Leia.]]
In 5 ABY the ''New Hope'' was not far from [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical frigate]] ''[[Mercy (hospital ship)|Mercy]]'' which was receiving casualties from [[Shackel]]. Mon Mothma with Luke and Leia were discussing the distribution of medical supplies. That time, [[Jan Ors]] took a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] from ''Mercy'' and docked to the Dreadnaught fifteen [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]] later, seeking [[Xiong Wong]]. "[[Wires]]" helped them [[Slicer/Legends|crack]] Katarn's [[Hologram disc/Legends|holodisk]], when Jan learned about the "[[Valley of the Jedi]]". Thinking that the [[Imperial Remnant]] was after that, she interrupted Mothma's meeting and showed them Katarn's partial message. After some arguments, Mothma agreed to Jan allowing Katarn [[Mission to Sulon|continue]] his personal investigations on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]], watching his movements.<ref name="RA">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>

Around that time, the ''New Hope'' moved to [[Milagro/Legends|Milagro]] and remained in its orbit for about two [[standard month/Legends|months]], serving as a space platform for the [[Alliance_High_Command/Legends|Rebel Command]]. From there it dispatched its escorting Battle Group to the [[Manali system/Legends|Menali system]] for a mission, leaving it defenseless. But six [[standard day/Legends|days]] later, an Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], entered the system and launched [[TIE/sa_bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] against the dreadnaught. In the [[Battle in the Milagro system|ensuing attack]], wounded pilots who freshly (or not-yet) recovered in the ''Mercy'' were ferried planetside to man some starfighters and join a [[squadron/Legends|squadron]] of ''New Hope''{{'s}} new [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]]. While waiting for them, the dreadnaught's [[Deflector_shield/Legends|shields]] fell and it started receiving damage, such as at [[turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] battery 14, core generator 3 and the compartment A-43. The port [[sensor array/Legends|sensor array]] with ten [[escape pod/Legends|escape pods]] were lost. During the counterattack, the ''New Hope'' lost [[cooling stack]] when a TIE pilot crushed on its hull.<ref name="JK" /><ref name="JK audio">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref> 
[[File:KyleMeetsLuke-DF3.jpg|thumb|Kyle Katarn and Jan Ors meet the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]] after the battle of Milagro.]]
Thanks to the tactics of Skywalker and the support from the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''{{'s}} group, the Destroyer broke formation and the ''Hope'' had the opportunity to engage it directly. During the battle a [[torpedo/Legends|torpedo]] penetrated the hull and five minutes later an Imperial fighter happened to crash right there, and broke into the corridor's bulkhead; after the surrender of the Star Destroyer and the victorious outcome, the [[damage-control party]] filled the gaps with emergency sealer and pressurized it, while the front part of the ship, and the young pilot's body remained on the corridor for some time after the battle. The corridors were crowded by crews, [[repair droid/Legends|repair droids]] and cable runs. Soon after the battle, Katarn and Ors met with the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]] in Mon Mothma's cabin to discuss the developments around [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] and his quest for the Valley of the Jedi, and planned their next move for [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]].<ref name="JK" />

==Personnel==
In 1 BBY, the [[Deck Master (New Hope)|Deck Master]] was responsible for the hangar bay. [[Jes (courier)|Jes]] was one of the pilots.<ref name="SFTE" />

By [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="RAJKDate">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' and ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' to [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].</ref> the ''New Hope''{{'s}} crew included [[Chief Warrant Officer]] [[Xiong Wong]], [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Olifer]], and "[[Wires]]."<ref name="DF:RA" /> During a [[battle in the Milagro system]], it was under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tola (Galactic Civil War)|Tola]] and carried a crack [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]].<ref name="DF:JK" />
